name: Daylight
description: A 60-foot-radius Sphere of Bright Light spreads from a point or object within range, with Dim Light for an additional 60 feet, for the duration. Sunlight-sensitive creatures are affected; Darkness created by a level 3 or lower spell is dispelled where the two areas overlap. Engine: a light utility narrated by the AIGM (lighting overlay not modelled for player spells yet).
